'''鈭歱-y-k-k''' ('''kapaykekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:establish|establish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:establish|establish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-y-k-k
|-
! Lemma
| kapaykekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipaykekoko|thipaykekoko]] || [[word:jipaykekoko|jipaykekoko]] || [[word:shipaykekoko|shipaykekoko]] || [[word:kipaykekoko|kipaykekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupaykekoko|thuthupaykekoko]] || [[word:jujupaykekoko|jujupaykekoko]] || [[word:shushupaykekoko|shushupaykekoko]] || [[word:kukupaykekoko|kukupaykekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupaykekoko|thupaykekoko]] || [[word:jupaykekoko|jupaykekoko]] || [[word:shupaykekoko|shupaykekoko]] || [[word:kupaykekoko|kupaykekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupaykekoko|thupaykekoko]] || [[word:jupaykekoko|jupaykekoko]] || [[word:shupaykekoko|shupaykekoko]] || [[word:kupaykekoko|kupaykekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepaykekoko|thepaykekoko]] || [[word:jepaykekoko|jepaykekoko]] || [[word:shepaykekoko|shepaykekoko]] || [[word:kepaykekoko|kepaykekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopaykekoko|thothopaykekoko]] || [[word:jojopaykekoko|jojopaykekoko]] || [[word:shoshopaykekoko|shoshopaykekoko]] || [[word:kokopaykekoko|kokopaykekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopaykekoko|thopaykekoko]] || [[word:jopaykekoko|jopaykekoko]] || [[word:shopaykekoko|shopaykekoko]] || [[word:kopaykekoko|kopaykekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopaykekoko|thopaykekoko]] || [[word:jopaykekoko|jopaykekoko]] || [[word:shopaykekoko|shopaykekoko]] || [[word:kopaykekoko|kopaykekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙paykekoko|th忙paykekoko]] || [[word:j忙paykekoko|j忙paykekoko]] || [[word:sh忙paykekoko|sh忙paykekoko]] || [[word:k忙paykekoko|k忙paykekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapaykekoko|thathapaykekoko]] || [[word:jajapaykekoko|jajapaykekoko]] || [[word:shashapaykekoko|shashapaykekoko]] || [[word:kakapaykekoko|kakapaykekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapaykekoko|thapaykekoko]] || [[word:japaykekoko|japaykekoko]] || [[word:shapaykekoko|shapaykekoko]] || [[word:kapaykekoko|kapaykekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapaykekoko|thapaykekoko]] || [[word:japaykekoko|japaykekoko]] || [[word:shapaykekoko|shapaykekoko]] || [[word:kapaykekoko|kapaykekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
